STABILIZATION_PHASE_2.title: Stabilization Phase 2: Component Hardening
STABILIZATION_PHASE_2.instruction_raw: Implement component-level hardening from MISSION_STABILIZATION_FINAL_SPEC.md. 1. Refactor ConfigWrapper to be 'Strict' in test_scenario_runner.py. 2. Fix tests broken by strict config. 3. Final cleanup of redundant gc.collect() calls.

STABILIZATION_PHASE_1.title: Stabilization Phase 1: Core Infrastructure
STABILIZATION_PHASE_1.instruction_raw: Implement the core infrastructure fixes from MISSION_STABILIZATION_FINAL_SPEC.md. 1. Add MockRegistry and automated patch-hook to tests/conftest.py. 2. Refactor FinanceSystem to use safe weakref.ref. 3. Update fixtures to pin government mocks.

SCENARIO_REPORTER_IMPL.title: Implementation: Scenario Reporter Orchestrator
SCENARIO_REPORTER_IMPL.instruction_raw: Implement the missing ScenarioReporter orchestrator based on MISSION_REBIRTH_SCENARIO_REPORTER_SPEC.md. 1. Create ScenarioReporter class in modules/scenarios/reporter.py. 2. Implement aggregate_reports() and write_markdown_report() methods. 3. Ensure it harvests metrics from WorldState via IWorldStateMetricsProvider.
